details:
• Improved application responsiveness and user experience for engineering teams by building React.js + Redux dashboards with lazy loading and modular architecture.
  • Accelerated decision-making by boosting data exchange performance by 37% through optimized Spring Boot APIs and backend queries.
  • Reduced manual monitoring effort and operator dependency by developing Niagara modules for scheduling, alarm management, and real-time visibility.
  • Increased operational efficiency of building systems by ~20% by automating workflows and reducing repetitive engineering tasks.
  • Preserved stability of existing deployments while enabling new features by extending legacy Alerton Compass systems using Core Java.
  • Improved reliability of device communication in constrained environments by optimizing byte-level data transmission for DDC controllers.
  • Enabled high-throughput and stable system performance under load by engineering scalable, multithreaded Java solutions.
  • Enabled real-time monitoring and faster fault detection by integrating BACnet IP/MS-TP, Modbus, Panel Bus, and MQTT protocols.
  • Improved accessibility and reduced dependency on legacy setups by enabling browser-based support for Java-based UIs.
  • Increased release stability and reduced production issues by enhancing testing and build pipelines using Karma, Jasmine, and Gradle.

• Involved in a large-scale brownfield PSU EPCM project for the Government of India under the guidance of the Chief Engineer.
  • Developed and maintained the instrument index and wiring diagrams.
  • Prepared functional loop schematics and technical specification sheets for control valves and other instrumentation in Smart Plant Instrumentation.
  • Managed purchase orders and coordinated with vendors for timely procurement.
  • Prepared detailed Instrument Hookups and corresponding bills of material for project-wide procurement.
  • Validated and prepared IO counts for DCS, ESD, and FGS systems using P&ID diagrams.

• Built RESTful APIs using Node.js/Express with MongoDB, optimizing query patterns and indexing to reduce latency and improve performance.
  • Developed React components with Redux for efficient state management, minimizing re-renders and improving UI responsiveness.
  • Refactored async workflows and modularized backend routes/middleware, enhancing scalability and reducing redundant API calls (~15% improvement).
Graduated with CGPA 9.65 with an elective of Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning.

Passed with 94%
Represented and led the football team at various state-level tournaments.
